The '''''Battle Dog''''' was a [[Quasar Fire-class cruiser-carrier/Legends|''Quasar Fire''-class cruiser-carrier]] in the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]].

==History==
The ''Battle Dog'' served in Group Two of the [[Solo Fleet]] during the hunt for [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]. During this period, its starfighter complement included two [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]], one of which was [[Lightning Squadron (New Republic)|Lightning Squadron]]; [[Shadow Squadron (New Republic)|Shadow Squadron]], flying [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] fighters; and a squadron of [[CloakShape fighter/Legends|CloakShape fighters]]. At the time, ''Battle Dog''{{'s}} commander was Captain [[Geng Salaban]].

{{Ship-stub}}
